description_long: This is a clear plastic bottle with a white screw cap, containing a carbonated lemon-flavored beverage. The bottle is cylindrical with a slightly tapered neck and a rounded shoulder, and it features a blue label wrapped around the midsection. The label displays the 'WILKINSON' brand in bold white letters on a blue background, with yellow lemon graphics and additional product information in smaller text. The bottle's surface appears slightly frosted, giving it a cold, chilled look, and the bottom is molded with three prominent feet for stability. The cap is sealed and has a red ring, indicating it is unopened. The overall appearance suggests a standard single-serving beverage bottle commonly found in urban environments.
description: A clear plastic bottle with a white screw cap, blue 'WILKINSON' lemon label, and frosted surface, containing a carbonated drink. The bottle has a cylindrical shape with a stable, footed base and yellow lemon graphics.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from an angle showing the barcode and nutritional information on the blue label, with the white cap and frosted body visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the bottle, displaying the 'WILKINSON' logo and 'LEMON' text prominently on the blue label, with lemon graphics on either side.
description_view_2: The bottle is rotated to show the recycling symbol and part of the label's side, with the cap and frosted plastic body still visible.
description_view_3: This view is similar to the front but slightly offset, showing the 'WILKINSON' logo and more of the lemon graphics, with the cap and bottle shape clearly defined.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a blue label with the 'WILKINSON' logo in white, the word 'LEMON' in yellow, lemon slice graphics, a barcode, recycling symbols, and additional product information in white text.
